notes: Model-independent 3-dimension corpus. Gold is human-defined, never model-derived. selection_resnums 'expected' fields marked PENDING_FREEZE are frozen deterministically on the ref structure via scripts/freeze_zone_gold.py. Uses reviewer-approved extensions: gold_usability.clarify_about, per-case session, nested-AND tools, required_args.command_contains_any (see harness_patch.md).

reference_structures.1HSG: HIV-1 protease homodimer, chains A/B + ligand (dimer/zone/interface)
reference_structures.1IL8: IL-8, chain A numbered 2..72 (resnum != seq-position trap)

cases.prompt: Colour chain A red.
Make chain B blue.
Show chain A as a cartoon.
Display the ligand as sticks.
Give every chain its own colour.
Colour chain A as a rainbow from N to C terminus.
Colour the ligand by element.
Colour chain A by B-factor.
Colour chain A red, then make it green.
Colour everything except chain A grey.

assertion.criterion: chain B (and ligand) grey; chain A unchanged

cases.prompt: I was reading about CamSol earlier; anyway, just colour chain B yellow.
Show chain A as cartoon and colour it teal.
Colour the chain red.
Change the colour of chain A.
Hide chain B.
Show chain A.
Hide the water.
Hide the cartoon for chain B only.
Show the side chains of chain A.
Hide everything that isn't chain A.

assertion.criterion: chain A visible; chain B + ligand + solvent hidden

cases.prompt: Display only the ligand.
Hide chain A except the helices.

assertion.criterion: helical residues of A remain shown; rest hidden

cases.prompt: Show chain B, actually hide it.
The disulfide finder was useful, but for now hide chain A's atoms.
Hide chain B and show its surface.
Hide it.
Select chain A.
Select the ligand.
Select residues within 5 Å of the ligand.

assertion.criterion: residues with any atom within 5 Å of ligand

cases.prompt: Select chain A residues within 4 Å of chain B.

assertion.criterion: chain-A residues within 4 Å of chain B (interface)

cases.prompt: Select everything within 8 Å of residue 25 of chain A.
Which residues of chain B contact chain A?

assertion.criterion: chain-B residues within ~4 Å of chain A

cases.prompt: Select residues within 6 Å of the current selection.

assertion.criterion: residues within 6 Å of the current selection

cases.prompt: Select chain A residues more than 8 Å from chain B.

assertion.criterion: chain-A residues with NO atom within 8 Å of chain B

cases.prompt: Select chain A residues NOT within 6 Å of the ligand.

assertion.criterion: chain-A residues farther than 6 Å from the ligand

cases.prompt: Select the interface residues on both chains.

assertion.criterion: union of A-near-B and B-near-A interface residues

cases.prompt: Use the zone tool to grab everything within 5 Å of chain A.

assertion.criterion: residues within 5 Å of chain A; must NOT use the Chimera-1 'zone' keyword

cases.prompt: Select residues within 5 Å — no, within 10 Å of the ligand.

assertion.criterion: within 10 Å of ligand (last value wins)

cases.prompt: Select chain A residues between 4 and 8 Å of chain B.

assertion.criterion: A residues in the 4–8 Å shell from B

cases.prompt: Select atoms within 5 Å of chain A but not chain A itself.

assertion.criterion: atoms within 5 Å of A, excluding A
